title: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Big Rigs
summary: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Big Rigs are a series of multi-axled car carrier vehicles intended to be compatible with Hot Wheels Monster Trucks. This series was conceived by Brendon Vetuskey and Gabriel De La Torre, with design work done by Omar González.

title: Wall Tracks
summary:
right|200x200px
Hot Wheels Wall Tracks are a unique type of stunt track specially designed to fit onto a vertical surface - such as a wall. First coming out in 2011, the Wall Tracks use 3M Command Strips to stick to the wall. Only certain cars work fully on every track.

title: Hot Wheels: Turbo Racing
summary: Hot Wheels Turbo Racing is a racing video game released for the Nintendo 64 and PlayStation in 1999 published by Electronic Arts and developed by Stormfront Studios. It features 40 cars based on the Hot Wheels series of toys by Mattel. It also features Kyle Petty's 1999 NASCAR stock car, as it was sponsored by Hot Wheels.
